film.title: Snowden
film.overview: CIA employee Edward Snowden leaks thousands of classified documents to the press.

dialogues.dialogue: Rangers... So you wanna be Special Forces?  So you wanna be Special Forces?  I think Special Forces would be ashamed  to call you soldiers. Am I right?  Sir, no, sir!
dialogues.cause_raw: not meeting the standards of Special Forces

dialogues.dialogue: He's embarrassed. It was a lot of money for us.  Day trading is a perilous sport.  You shouldn't be ashamed of it.  I'm gonna grab some food. See you guys inside?  Sure.
Perfect.  Twirl around.  Perfect! I'm so proud of you!  When you're really happy,  there's a large part of you that just wants to stay happy.
